response.justification: Strong individual-contributor background with 15+ years of software development across web, mobile, desktop, and embedded systems, but the resume shows no formal people management or team leadership experience, which is the core requirement of this role. There is also no evidence of building developer tools at scale (compilers, build systems, test automation infrastructure) or mobile-platform engineering productivity work. Workshop teaching and founding an open-source project demonstrate technical leadership traits but do not substitute for the 2+ years of direct people management required.
strengths: 15+ years of broad software engineering experience across multiple stacks and domains
Demonstrated technical leadership through workshops, talks, course creation, and open-source project founding
Exposure to TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development, and DevOps tooling (GitLab, Docker, CI servers)
concerns: No explicit people management or direct-report leadership experience listed
Lacks dedicated developer-tools/build-systems/test-infrastructure experience at the scale implied
No mobile-platform ecosystem engineering productivity background
